zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh de Chesney of Graffham & Ducklington於1107年出生在英國素可時，他的父親Roger de Chesney28歲，母親Alice Langetot34歲。他與Denise Bereford結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1166年在英國奧可福爾享年60歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Chesney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and Irish (Antrim, Down): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac (an) tSasanaigh, see McChesney .
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Chaney  , a cognate of 3 below.
French: topographic name for someone who lived by or in an oak wood, from Old French chesnai ‘oak grove’ (from chesne ‘oak’). Compare Cheney 2.

variants.name: McChesney
meanings: Scottish (Galloway) and northern Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac (an) tSasanaigh ‘son of the Saxon (i.e. the Englishman)’. The spelling seems to represent Mac Shasanaigh, to be pronounced originally as McHasney, rather than the English spelling ch.

variants.name: Chestnut
meanings: Scottish (Renfrewshire and Lanarkshire) and northern Irish: altered form of Chesney , shortened from McChesney . Its assimilation to the English word chestnut is due to folk etymology, the word itself being first recorded in 1519. The surname was probably taken to Ireland at the time of the 17th-century Plantation of Ulster.
English (Norfolk): probably a variant of Chestney (see Chaney ), altered by folk etymological association with the word chestnut.

variants.name: Chesna
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Chesney  .

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh de Chesney of Graffham & Ducklington was born in 1107, in Sussex, England, his father, Roger de Chesney, was 28 and his mother, Alice Langetot, was 34. He married Denise Bereford. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died about 1166, in Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh de Chesney of Graffham & Ducklington est né en 1107, à Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Roger de Chesney, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Alice Langetot, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Denise Bereford. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1166, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh de Chesney of Graffham & Ducklingtonが1107年にイギリススセックスで生まれた時，父Roger de Chesneyは28歳，母Alice Langetotは34歳であった。Denise Berefordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1166年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh de Chesney of Graffham & Ducklington(이)가 1107년 영국 수세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Chesney(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Langetot(은)는 34세였다. 그는 Denise Bereford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1166년 영국 스퍼드실르에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh de Chesney of Graffham & Ducklington родился в 1107 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger de Chesney было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Langetot, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Denise Bereford. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1166 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 60 лет.
